footer.desc: The ultimate AI-powered agriculture platform helping farmers maximize yield, reduce risks, and build a sustainable future.
footer.subscribeDesc: Subscribe to receive the latest AI agriculture updates, market intelligence, farming innovations, and product announcements.

home.heroDesc: AgroSathi uses AI and real-time insights to help farmers make the best decisions for higher yield, better profits, and sustainable farming.

crop.title: AI Crop Prediction
crop.desc: AI analyzes soil, weather, and environment factors to predict the best crops for higher yield and profitability.

market.title: Market Price Prediction
market.desc: Predict future market prices and demand trends to sell at the right time and maximize profits.

weather.title: Weather Analysis
weather.desc: Get hyper-local, accurate weather forecasts based on your farm's location to plan your farming activities effectively.

soil.title: Soil Analysis
soil.desc: Test your soil health and get personalized fertilizer recommendations to improve crop yield and soil fertility.

dashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Visualize your farm data, track performance, and monitor key metrics in one intelligent dashboard.

gov.title: Government Schemes
gov.desc: Discover and apply for the latest government schemes and subsidies easily.

drone.title: Drone & Satellite Insights
drone.desc: Monitor crop health, land conditions, and growth using satellite and drone imagery.

chat.title: AI Chatbot Assistant
chat.desc: Get instant answers to your farming queries with our AI-powered smart assistant.

alerts.title: Smart Alerts & Notifications
alerts.desc: Receive timely alerts for weather, pests, irrigation, and market changes.

irrigation.title: Irrigation Management
irrigation.desc: Plan irrigation schedules smartly to save water and improve crop yield.

disease.title: Disease Detection
disease.desc: Detect crop diseases early using AI image analysis and prevent large-scale damage.

profit.title: Profit Calculator
profit.desc: Estimate costs, profits, and ROI for different crops and farming practices.

weather.heroDesc: AgroSathi combines live weather APIs, satellite observations, AI forecasting models, and climate analytics to provide accurate weather predictions that help farmers make informed irrigation, sowing, spraying, and harvesting decisions.

form.title: Select Farm Location
form.disclaimer: Weather predictions are generated using IMD, OpenWeather, NASA satellite data, and AI forecasting models.

results.footerInfo: Forecast generated using historical weather data, satellite observations, and AI climate prediction.

sidebar.advice3: Delay pesticide spraying due to expected rainfall
